feedback.text: As someone who has been using digital goods almost all my life I'm glad to see this act because worked on. Unfortunately I am disappointed to see no protection against publishers of video games taking servers and backends down leaving the games EU citizens have paid for useless and unplayable. I would love to see protection for these EU citizens added so that end of life plans become mandatory for publishers to implement into the game. This will allow players to still enjoy there purchases and the things they own long after support has been dropped by the publishers. Thank you for all the work you do!
